titleStmt.title: SII 34.325: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 325. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the first gōpura of the Haratīrthēśvara temple, left of entrance.

summary.p: Śaka 1789, K i 4968, Prabhava, Mithuna (Āni) 2, Utta-Bhādrapadā, Monday = Probably A.D. 1867, June 24.

This bilingual inscription in Sanskrit and Telugu written in Telugu script records that King Rāmachandra performed the kumbhābhishēka ceremony of the god Haratīrthēśvara and of the goddess Bṛihadāmbā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
samaśaradi śālivāhana śakētha chidasikaiḥ kalau
ca hita valaiḥ . prabhavaśaradi midhunērka bhā
drapadarkshē śaśāṃka divasa samayē . ku
mbhābhishēka Āsīt bṛihadaṃbā nā
makasya hara tīrthapatēḥ śrī bṛiha
daṃbā dāsē mahimavatikāpi rā
machaṃdra nṛipālē
svasti śrī śālivāhana śakābdaḥ—1789
kalyabdaḥ — 4968 prabhava saṃvatsaraṃ
nela 2 tēdi sōmavāraṃ Uttarābhā
dra nakshatraṃ yī śubha dinamaṃdu mahā
rājarājē śrī rāmacaṃdra mahārāchu
vāri yokka Ājñachāta śrī bṛihadaṃ
bā hara tirthāśvara svāmiki kum
bhābhishēkaṃ śāyanainadi ..
Digital edition of SII 34.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
